## Endpoint

Method, path, and route classification.

## Auth And Permissions

Public/protected/provider/internal/optional-auth classification and required permissions/scopes.

Parameters, body, headers, validation, and examples.

## Response

Success shape, status codes, and examples.

## Errors

Error codes, status codes, and failure modes.

## Side Effects

Writes, provider calls, notifications, audit logs, or cache invalidation.

## Security Notes

Spoofing, resource scope, rate/security considerations, RLS/RPC relationship.

## Tests

Unit, route/API, e2e, smoke, and known gaps.
